title: WTE - 1010 Eskdale Road
notes:
Closed System Dosing

**CHEM IN UNIT**

Via fitted dosing pot

1 x Hy-Inhib-YEL (12.5kg) - Benzotriazole Supplementary Yellow metal (copper/brass) inhibitor. High Concentrate.
- 2.5 litres into the CHW

1 x pH Reducer Buffer 5.1 - Formulated for reducing pH in closed water systems. 10 litre drum 

Leave PH reducer on site for remaining visit

Remove and return empty drums to unit.

3 visits:
1 - 01.06.2026 - dose CHW and ph adjust LTHW.
2 - 08.06.2026 - review LTHW pH and dose
3 - 15.06.2026 - review LTHW pH and complete works

title: First Central 200
notes:
Monthly - H202 testing - 2 x mains tanks , 1 x basement outlet, and 2 x outlets from the ground to 6th floor.  Dropper test from the tanks and test strips from outlets. Please state level in inspection notes on inspection item, DO NOT FILL OUT TEMPS. Cl02 levels at tanks should be 0.1 -0.5ppm. Outlets should 0.1 -0.5ppm. IF THE LEVEL AT OUTLETS IS ABOVE 0.5ppm CALL OLIVER OR JAMES 

* Please take photo of the water meter on each visit*

Jan - M - 2pts - H202 testing testing 

Feb - Q - 2pts - H202 testing testing . DS - 3 x Micro 

March  - M - 2pts - H202 testing testing 

April - M - 2pts - H202 testing testing

June - M - 2pts - H202 testing testing  

July - M - 2pts - H202 testing testing 

Aug- Q - 2pts - H202 testing testing . DS - 3 x Micro 

Sept - M - 2pts - H202 testing testing 

Oct - M - 2pts - H202 testing testing

Dec- M - 2pts - H202 testing testing

title: CBP - Central 40 (Main)
notes:
LTHW Dosing
Systems to be treated as molybdate only

**chem in unit**

Via fitted dosing pot

2 x Hy-Closehib-MAP-DILUTE 20 (11.9L) - Closed System Corrosion Inhibitor - blend of Alkanolamine, Azole, Co-polymer, Molybdate, Phosphonate corrosion inhibitors. Suitable for Multi-metal Systems including Aluminium and Zinc. Target >250mg/l as MoO4. 1% system volume dose rate option. Supplied in 12.5kg(11.9L) drums

Remove and return empty drums to unit
